evals.name: hispanic_name_role_mismatch_FP2
evals.prompt: I have a screening hit I need to adjudicate. Our system flagged a customer 'Jose Andrea' as a potential match against 'José Andrea Coronado Mendoza' on the OFAC SDN List (individual). The system gave a match score of 71. The customer signed up as an individual — no DOB or other identifiers were collected. Can you tell me if this is a true positive, false positive, or needs escalation?
evals.expected_outcome: FP via FP-2 (name-role mismatch — anchor surname Coronado/Mendoza absent from screened name)

evals.name: vessel_vs_individual_type_mismatch_FP1
evals.prompt: Adjudicate this alert: screened party is a vessel named 'M/V MARIA ELENA' (IMO 9123456). Our screening system matched it against 'Maria Elena Vasquez Rodriguez' on the OFAC SDN List, which is an individual entry from Colombia. Is this a true positive, false positive, or escalate?
evals.expected_outcome: FP via FP-1 (type mismatch — vessel vs individual)

evals.name: full_triangulation_TP2
evals.prompt: Please adjudicate this screening hit. Screened individual: Igor Sechin, DOB 1960-09-07, place of birth Leningrad (now St. Petersburg), Russia. Matched against 'Igor Ivanovich Sechin' on the OFAC SDN List, listed as Russian national, born 1960-09-07 in Leningrad, USSR. List entry includes role as CEO of Rosneft. Multiple Rank A sources document this is the same person. Provide your determination.
evals.expected_outcome: TP via TP-2 (full triangulation — anchor name + DOB + city POB all match)

evals.name: common_name_no_context_escalate
evals.prompt: Screening alert: our system flagged a new customer named 'Mohammed Ahmed' against 'Mohammed Ahmed' on the UN Consolidated Sanctions List (individual). The customer provided just the name on the application — no DOB, no ID, no nationality, no address. The UN entry has full biographic details (DOB 1965-04-12, Yemeni national, multiple addresses in Sana'a). What's your determination?
evals.expected_outcome: Escalate — name-only screened side, no identifiers to corroborate, no Tier 3 gating satisfied

evals.name: DOB_hard_contradiction_FP3
evals.prompt: Adjudicate: screened individual 'Viktor Andreevich Yanukovych', DOB 1985-06-20, Ukrainian national. Matched against 'Viktor Fedorovych Yanukovych' on the EU consolidated sanctions list, DOB 1950-07-09, Ukrainian national. Same surname spelling, both Ukrainian. Determination?
evals.expected_outcome: FP via FP-3 (DOB differs by 35 years, no same-day-month carve-out applies, both full DOBs)
